Latest.description:
# New Dependancy Required!
Phone Extension: [https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/24949](Nexus)

#New Features
 - Traps
 - You will get new item notifications via V's phone instead of only in the  #console
 - Additional YAML options

# Bug Fixes
 - Fixed sub-district access token items being placed in the multiworld despite not being enabled as an option yet
 - Fixed items being duplicated when connected/disconnecting from the AP client (still needs more abuse testing)
 - Fixed progressive items not being cached/processed correctly
 - Fixed Regina's Psycho Killer quest being a required check even with "Include Cyberpsycho Sightings" disabled
 - Removed Blackwall Gateway from the item pool as the game does not allow it to be a quickhack and requires a specific cyberdeck

# Changes
 - Tarot cards can no longer have Progression items from the multi-world attached to them.

# Hotfix 1
- Fixed a typo in the District Enforcer script that caused City Center to not unlock
Latest.title: Cyberpunk Archipelago Mod v0.4

v0.0.2.description:
**New**
Quickhacks have been turned into "Progression Items" to make it much easier for it to be balanced in bigger sessions.
Added Tarot Locations
Added Gig Locations
Added Minor Quest Locations
Added Contract Locations

**Fixes**
Item's unable to be placed on Cyberpsycho Sightings
v0.0.2.title: Cyberpunk Archipelago Mod V0.0.2

v0.3.description:
Fixed:
 - Deathlink not working
 - V Being teleported from the trash heap after love like fire
 - Typo causing the disctrict enforcement to not unlock City Center
 
NOTE: If you are upgrading from 0.0.2 you will need a new YAML and a new SAVE file! Do not ask for support with sync issues if the game was NOT started while using v0.3. You will also need to remove the "{Cyberpunk Install Dir}\archive\pc\mod\CyberpunkArchipelagoMod.archive" file from your game as it contains broken quest progression.

New:
Bi-directional Progression Sync
Enforced progression blocking via District travel restrictions and required items added to the multi-world
YAML options added to control how many quests you want to include as checks

Improvements:
Lifepath choices have been consolidated into 1 check.
Point of no return (post Nocturne Op55N1) quests have been consolidated into 1 ending check.
Removed:

Quest blockers for all quests were removed from the mod due to causing hard locks even after getting the requisite item to progress
v0.3.title: Cyberpunk Archipelago Mod V0.3 Hotfix 5
